<?php /** * This code was generated by * \ / _ _ _| _ _ * | (_)\/(_)(_|\/| |(/_ v1.0.0 * / / */ namespace Twilio\TwiML\Voice; use Twilio\TwiML\TwiML; class SsmlSub extends TwiML { /** * SsmlSub constructor. * * @param string $words Words to be substituted * @param array $attributes Optional attributes */ public function __construct($words, $attributes = []) { parent::__construct('sub', $words, $attributes); } /** * Add Alias attribute. * * @param string $alias Substitute a different word (or pronunciation) for * selected text such as an acronym or abbreviation */ public function setAlias($alias): self { return $this->setAttribute('alias', $alias); } }
